purpose: Defines the `!export [dashboardId] [--format markdown|json]` command for exporting a dashboard's full swarm state as a formatted document. Reads initialization.json, logs.json, all progress files, and metrics.json (optional) in parallel; merges initialization with progress data to derive stats; outputs either raw JSON (single combined object) or structured markdown (header + Task Summary table + Deviations table + Event Timeline + Performance Metrics). Read-only — terminal output only, no file writes.
gotchas: metrics.json is optional and may not exist — the markdown export must handle the missing-metrics case with a fallback message ('No performance metrics available')
Format flag rejects unrecognized values with explicit error — only `markdown` and `json` are supported
Uses the same merge pattern as !status — for each agent in initialization.json, look up its progress file; missing progress means status='pending'
Elapsed time is derived: earliest started_at to latest completed_at, or to now if still running
patterns: 5-step procedure: resolve+parse → parallel reads → merge+derive stats → generate format-specific output → display
JSON format produces a single combined object with task/derived/agents/waves/log_entries/metrics keys
Markdown format follows fixed structure: header → Task Summary table → Deviations → Event Timeline → Performance Metrics
Status emojis: completed=done, in_progress=running, failed=error, pending=waiting
conventions: Step 1 / Step 2 / Step 3 / Step 4 / Step 5 sub-headers
Two parallel sub-sections under Step 4 for JSON vs Markdown formats
Trailing summary line with task count and format used
